response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has broad full-stack engineering experience spanning roughly 17 years and shows genuine entrepreneurial drive through Northwind Labs and several open-source projects. However, this Director-level IC role demands recognized AI strategy credentials, demonstrated AI product leadership at scale, and a track record of advising senior executives — none of which his profile substantially reflects. His AI work is limited to his current position (since April 2025), he holds no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and there is no evidence of the strategic customer advisory reach or external thought leadership this role requires.
strengths: ~17 years of multi-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, infrastructure, and embedded systems, meeting the minimum tenure requirement
Genuine entrepreneurial track record with Northwind Labs (founded 2016, ongoing) and multiple open-source projects demonstrating a self-directed builder mentality
Recent hands-on AI work including MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure, indicating timely relevance to the AI domain
concerns: AI expertise is very recent and shallow — current role began April 2025; the role demands years of recognized, demonstrated AI platform leadership, not months
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no evidence of published research, conference keynotes, or industry recognition that would establish recognized AI expertise
No demonstrated experience advising C-suite or strategic enterprise customers on cloud and AI adoption, which is a core and recurring responsibility of this Director-level IC position

key_factors.factor: No strategic advisory or executive-engagement track record
